summary: Iteration 11 testing completed for Semaforo de Cumplimiento and Reportes Operativos features. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features working correctly including semaforo widget with 4 clickable indicators, Reportes Operativos page with 6 tabs, and navigation.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor rendering issue on initial load, does not affect functionality (known issue from iteration 10)

passed_tests: GET /api/dashboard/semaforo - has semaforo color and score_general
GET /api/dashboard/semaforo - has 4 indicators (cumplimiento, kyc, control_10, aml)
GET /api/dashboard/semaforo - score_general is weighted average of 4 indicators
Frontend: Dashboard loads with semaforo widget
Frontend: Semaforo shows score (38.9%) and 4 indicators
Frontend: Semaforo indicators are clickable and navigate correctly
Frontend: Reportes Operativos page loads with 4 summary cards
Frontend: Resumen por Tipo tab shows chart and 80/20 concentration
Frontend: Top Donantes tab shows sorted donor list with accumulation
Frontend: Conciliacion CFDI tab shows donativos vs CFDI status grid
Frontend: Ficha Publica tab shows org info, financials, activities
Frontend: Navigation sidebar shows Reportes Operativos link
critical_code_review_comments: Semaforo correctly implements weighted average: cumplimiento*0.35 + kyc*0.25 + control10*0.20 + aml*0.20
Each indicator has proper color coding (verde>=80, ambar>=60, rojo<60)
Reportes Operativos correctly aggregates data from donativos, donantes, and cfdis collections
80/20 concentration analysis properly detects high concentration risk
Conciliacion CFDI correctly tracks donativos with/without CFDI and CFDI status
Ficha Publica aggregates transparency data from multiple sources
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 tested the new Semaforo de Cumplimiento and Reportes Operativos features. The semaforo combines 4 weighted indicators (cumplimiento 35%, kyc 25%, control10 20%, aml 20%) and displays on the Dashboard with clickable indicators that navigate to respective pages. Reportes Operativos page has 6 tabs: Resumen por Tipo, Top Donantes, En Especie, Extranjero, Conciliacion CFDI, and Ficha Publica. All backend APIs return proper data structures. CFDI timbrado remains MOCKED.

mocked_apis.CFDI_PAC_Integration: CFDI timbrado (stamping) is MOCKED - returns simulated UUID
mocked_apis.Email_Notifications: Email notifications MOCKED - RESEND_API_KEY not configured

features_tested: Weighted score calculation (cumplimiento*0.35 + kyc*0.25 + control10*0.20 + aml*0.20)
4 indicators with individual scores and colors
Clickable indicators navigating to respective pages
4 summary cards (Total Donativos, Donantes Activos, En Especie, Del Extranjero)
Resumen por Tipo with bar chart
Ficha Publica with org info and financials
